description: A 9V source connected to a 606 ohm resistor, a 9.65e-03 Henry inductor, and a 8.83e-04 Farad capacitor in parallel.

A common-emitter BJT amplifier circuit powered by a 14V DC source. The NPN transistor is biased by a voltage divider with R1=9000 ohms and R2=4000 ohms. An AC signal of 0.44V is coupled to the base through a 2.86e-06F capacitor (C1). The collector resistor R3 is 1452 ohms and the emitter resistor R4 is 265 ohms. The amplified output is coupled through C2 (4.13e-06F) to a load resistor RL of 5000 ohms.
